Bar Plot.summary: Compare values across categories using bars.

fields.name: Categorical Variable(s)
fields.detail: Select one or more label/group columns (for example: Species, Region).

fields.name: Numerical Variable
fields.detail: Select the numeric metric to aggregate or compare.

fields.name: Orientation
fields.detail: Vertical for standard bars, Horizontal for long labels.

steps: Choose category column(s) first.
Select the numeric column for bar height/length.
Set orientation and click Generate.

Pie Plot.summary: Show category distribution as proportional slices.

fields.name: Categorical Variable
fields.detail: Select one or more category columns only. Numerical input is not required for this plot.

steps: Select the category column to segment the pie.
Use Generate to render category proportions.

Histogram.summary: Visualize frequency distribution of numeric values.

fields.name: Numerical Variable(s)
fields.detail: Select one or more numeric columns to inspect distribution.

fields.name: Orientation
fields.detail: Switch axis direction when needed.

fields.name: Auto Bin / Bins
fields.detail: Use Auto Bin for automatic buckets, or manually tune bin count.

fields.name: KDE
fields.detail: Enable KDE to overlay a smooth density trend.

steps: Pick numeric variable(s).
Adjust bins/KDE if needed.
Click Generate to view distribution.

Box Plot.summary: Compare spread, quartiles, and outliers across groups.

fields.name: Categorical Variable(s)
fields.detail: Group data by category.

fields.name: Numerical Variable
fields.detail: Choose the numeric measure to analyze.

fields.name: Hue (optional)
fields.detail: Add a second category split inside each group.

fields.name: Orientation
fields.detail: Choose vertical or horizontal layout.

steps: Select category and numeric columns.
Optionally add hue for deeper comparison.
Set orientation and Generate.

Violin Plot.summary: Show distribution shape and spread by category.

fields.name: Numerical Variable
fields.detail: Select the numeric column to model distribution.

fields.name: Categorical Variable
fields.detail: Group distributions by category.

fields.name: Hue (optional)
fields.detail: Split each category by an additional class.

fields.name: Orientation
fields.detail: Switch vertical/horizontal rendering.

steps: Choose numeric and categorical columns.
Optionally add hue and orientation.
Generate the violin chart.

Scatter Plot.summary: Explore relationship between two numeric variables.

fields.name: X Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric column(s) for horizontal axis.

fields.name: Y Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric column for vertical axis.

fields.name: Hue (optional)
fields.detail: Color points by category for segment insights.

steps: Choose X and Y numeric columns.
Optionally add hue for category-wise patterns.
Click Generate.

Reg Plot.summary: Analyze trend and fit line between two numeric variables.

fields.name: X Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric column(s) for predictor axis.

fields.name: Y Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric response column.

steps: Choose X and Y numerical columns.
Click Generate to inspect trend and fit.

Line Plot.summary: Track numeric changes across an ordered numeric axis.

fields.name: X Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric column(s) for horizontal progression.

fields.name: Y Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric metric to plot.

fields.name: Hue (optional)
fields.detail: Split lines by category.

steps: Select X and Y numeric columns.
Optionally set hue for multiple line groups.
Generate the chart.

Custom Plot.summary: Create a flexible numeric comparison chart.

fields.name: X Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric column(s) for the X axis.

fields.name: Y Variable
fields.detail: Select numeric metric for Y axis.

fields.name: Hue (optional)
fields.detail: Color/group data by category if needed.

steps: Configure X, Y, and optional hue.
Click Generate to preview the custom visualization.
